goal: Keep runtime Harness truth-intake tasks closed-loop from missing-material blocking through source archival, task payload updates, prompt/tool access, and safe completion behavior.

acceptance_criteria.description: Restricted LLM file tools can read and grep the active truth-intake archive attached to the current Harness task.
Broad restricted greps under data/ narrow to the active truth-intake archive before stale temp or historical files.
Harness prompt injection exposes active truth-intake source_archive_dir and source_attachment paths and warns against data/temp historical material.
When a blocked truth-intake task receives materials, the Harness task payload is merged with archive_dir and attachments before moving in_progress.
acceptance_criteria.verification: uv run env PYTHONPATH=.:dc_engines pytest data/plugins/llm_router/test_dc_router_path.py -k truth_intake -q

acceptance_criteria.description: Harness lifecycle supports non-terminal payload merges and rejects payload mutation after terminal completion.
Harness sensor blocks truth-intake tasks instead of completing them when the response says materials are missing or unverifiable.
